contract_role: Initialize runtime context for ASGI scope/event processing.
hot_path_notes: May be skipped for session-bound message/frame loops when context is already bound.

contract_role: Normalize ASGI scope/event into compact contract-derived context.
hot_path_notes: Required for every new inbound request, frame, chunk, datagram, or lifecycle event.

contract_role: Resolve scope/path/method, binding, family, subevent, and op plan.
hot_path_notes: For session-bound transports this should use prebound route state rather than path rematch.

contract_role: Resolve guard/security/dependency preconditions before transaction begin.
hot_path_notes: Can be omitted for static or already-authorized route classes.

contract_role: Open transaction or transactional execution boundary.
hot_path_notes: Only present for op plans that require DB/effect transaction semantics.

contract_role: Validate input, resolve values, prepare handler inputs.
hot_path_notes: May be non-transactional for pure/message/session paths.

contract_role: Execute semantic op or lifecycle handler.
hot_path_notes: Required unless route is fully static/prebuilt.

contract_role: Run post-handler transforms, reducers, or side-effect preparation.
hot_path_notes: Omit if op has no post-handler obligations.

contract_role: Prepare transactional commit boundary.
hot_path_notes: Only present for transactional writes or explicit commit policies.

contract_role: Commit or close transactional boundary.
hot_path_notes: Only present when START_TX is present.

contract_role: Build semantic output after transaction boundary.
hot_path_notes: Can be skipped for static routes or direct transport handlers.

contract_role: Shape semantic output into contract transport event payloads.
hot_path_notes: Can be folded into generated encoders.

contract_role: Finalize ASGI response/frame/chunk/datagram/close event.
hot_path_notes: Required for output-producing routes.

contract_role: Observe transport completion fence and optional emit-complete event.
hot_path_notes: May be minimal for accepted_by_runtime policies.

contract_role: Generic non-transactional error handling.
hot_path_notes: Cold path; should not burden hot ok plan.

contract_role: Error handling before transaction begins.
hot_path_notes: Cold path.

contract_role: Error handling during transaction start.
hot_path_notes: Cold path; may branch to rollback if partially opened.

contract_role: Error handling during pre-handler transactional work.
hot_path_notes: Cold path; rollback required when transaction opened.

contract_role: Error handling during semantic handler execution.
hot_path_notes: Cold path; rollback required when transaction opened.

contract_role: Error handling during post-handler transactional work.
hot_path_notes: Cold path; rollback required when transaction opened.

contract_role: Error handling before commit.
hot_path_notes: Cold path; rollback required.

contract_role: Error handling at commit/end transaction boundary.
hot_path_notes: Cold path; rollback or compensating action policy.

contract_role: Error handling after transaction has committed.
hot_path_notes: Cold path; cannot undo committed effects through normal rollback.

contract_role: Late transport completion or response error handling.
hot_path_notes: Diagnostic/telemetry path because output may already be committed.

contract_role: Rollback transactional side effects.
hot_path_notes: Cold path; only linked from transaction error branches.
